name: Khichhari
recipeIngredient: 1 each Juice of half a lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep peas in boiling water for 1 hour. Drain and rinse well.
2. In a large pot, heat oil and fry onions and spices over medium heat for 4 minutes.
3. Add split peas, rice, and green chili. Mix well. Pour on water and lemon juice. Add tomatoes and stir once. Cover and simmer gently until rice is soft, about 40 minutes. Season to taste and serve.
